sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 17

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 17:1
items.html:
(to the question) Binyan HaTzela [the building of the rib]
When there is in the Nukva [female] only the discernment of Galgalta ve Eynaim alone, with the lower Hey in her Eynaim [eyes] — and she then cleaves back-to-back [Achor be Achor] with ZA in a single wall — she is considered a rib [Tzela] of ZA, that is, a part of his body, for she cleaves to him and both serve in one wall. But after the ascent of the MAN [Mayin Nukvin] of ZA to AVI — for he raises the Chochma and Hasadim in him to them as MAN, and causes AVI to couple — the drop of the Zivug of AB then descends and brings the lower Hey down from the Eynaim of the Nukva. By this her AHP immediately return to the building of her body, and she thereby attains complete discernments of Achoraim [posterior] of AHP of her own. Then she is sawn off [Nisseret] and parted from ZA and becomes a Partzuf in her own right. (p. 771, Items 57 and 58).
